name: deps
source: dependency security advisories (pip-audit / npm audit vs lockfiles)
trigger: weekly advisory scan: npm audit at high+ severity; pip-audit every advisory (pip-audit emits no severity field). NEVER auto-updates anything -- each advisory becomes a proposal, the bump goes through a dispatch.
env_doc: No credential: both tools read public advisory databases. Each tool is present-or-skip inside query_cmd, so a repo with neither lockfile files nothing.
query_cmd: { if command -v pip-audit >/dev/null 2>&1 && [ -f requirements.txt ]; then pip-audit -r requirements.txt -f json 2>/dev/null | python3 rails/observers/extract.py pip; fi; if command -v npm >/dev/null 2>&1 && [ -f package-lock.json ]; then npm audit --json 2>/dev/null | python3 rails/observers/extract.py npm; fi; true; }
